nasb.text: And he measured its wall, seventy-two yards, according to human measurements, which are also angelic measurements.

esv.text: He also measured its wall, 144 cubits by human measurement, which is also an angel’s measurement.

cnv.text: 又量了城牆，約有六十公尺。天使用的標準，就是人量度的標準。

ccb.text: 他又丈量了城墙，按人的尺寸来算是六十五米厚。

csbs.text: 天使又测量了她的城墙，按人的尺度有一百四十四肘；这也是天使的尺度。
